title: Create:AbyssCatalysis
description: Compatible6.x!From China!Inspired by DeepDark and Sculk！
body:
The 0.3 update is compatible with 6.x！
This is a brand-new original mechanical power Create:AbyssCatalysis, inspired by the Sculk!
'Catalyst Chamber' and 'Mechanical Shrieker' are provided, which need to be paired for use!
